conditions.name: Tension Headache
conditions.description: Mild to moderate pain that feels like a tight band around your head.

conditions.name: Migraine
conditions.description: Severe throbbing pain typically on one side of the head, often accompanied by nausea.

conditions.name: Sinus Infection
conditions.description: Pain and pressure around your eyes, cheeks, and forehead.

actions: Rest in a quiet, dark room

conditions.name: Viral Upper Respiratory Infection
conditions.description: Common cold characterized by coughing, sneezing, and sore throat.

conditions.name: Allergies
conditions.description: Immune response to environmental triggers causing a persistent dry cough.

conditions.name: Bronchitis
conditions.description: Inflammation of the bronchial tubes causing a productive cough.

actions: If cough persists over 2 weeks, consult a physician

conditions.name: Possible Viral Illness
conditions.description: A general set of symptoms matching a common viral illness.

conditions.name: Fatigue/Stress Response
conditions.description: Physical manifestation of prolonged stress or lack of sleep.

conditions.name: Nutritional Deficiency
conditions.description: Symptoms related to lacking essential vitamins or minerals.

actions: Schedule a primary care visit if symptoms persist
